## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `npm run check` successfully.
- [ ] I added or updated tests where behavior changed.
- [ ] I did not add real Instagram exports, account data, profile details, or other personal information.
- [ ] I did not add credentials, tokens, local databases, private keys, or machine-specific paths.
- [ ] I updated the documentation for any user-facing or setup changes.
